**Joe Mazzulla has made a heartfelt admission following the Red Sox's decision to fire Alex Cora.** 
## Context / Background
The Red Sox have undergone a significant coaching shake-up, resulting in the departure of manager Alex Cora. This move has sent shockwaves throughout the MLB community, with many speculating about the reasons behind the decision. 
## Tactical Key Points / Stats Table
| Team | Manager | Coaching Staff |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Red Sox | Joe Mazzulla (interim) | TBA |
As the Red Sox look to move forward, they will be under the guidance of interim manager Joe Mazzulla. 
> 'I'm still trying to process everything, it's a difficult time for everyone involved.' - Joe Mazzulla
## What's Next? (Schedule)
The Red Sox will continue their season with a new manager at the helm. Fans will be eagerly awaiting the team's next move, as they look to bounce back from this significant change.
